name: HRA_CHECK_IN_MEETINGS
description: It will store UI field values for creating check-in meeting like check-in meeting name, date etc.

columns.Name: CHECK_IN_MEETING_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key of Check-In Meeting.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to HR_ALL_ORGANIZATION_UNITS

columns.Name: MANAGER_PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: This is the manager associated with this check-in meeting

columns.Name: WORKER_PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: This is the worker associated with this check-in meeting

columns.Name: WORKER_ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: This is the worker assignment id associated with this check-in meeting

columns.Name: CREATED_BY_PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: This is the id of person who created this check-in meeting.

columns.Name: CHECK_IN_TEMPLATE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to Templates table (HRA_CHECK_IN_TMPLS_B)

columns.Name: REVIEW_PERIOD_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to HRT_REVIEW_PERIODS_B

columns.Name: DOCUMENT_NAME
columns.Comments: Name of Check In Template

columns.Name: CHECK_IN_DATE
columns.Comments: This is the date when the check-in meeting is valid from

columns.Name: STATUS_CODE
columns.Comments: This is the status of check-in document.

columns.Name: TEMPLATE_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Identifies template type of the CheckIn document.

columns.Name: WORKER_QSTNR_DISCUSSED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Identify if the worker questionnaire has been discussed or not

columns.Name: MANAGER_QSTNR_DISCUSSED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Identify if the manager questionnaire has been discussed or not.

columns.Name: SCHEDULE_OWNER_ID
columns.Comments: This is the parent key for PER_CHECKLIST_SCHEDULES.SCHEDULE_OWNER_ID to create recurring check-ins.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: CALENDAR_INVITE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Identify if the create meeting invite is enabled or not.

columns.Name: CALENDAR_INVITE_START_TIME
columns.Comments: This is the start time of the check-in meeting in the invite.

columns.Name: CALENDAR_INVITE_END_TIME
columns.Comments: This is the end time of the check-in meeting in the invite.

columns.Name: CALENDAR_INVITE_DESCRIPTION
columns.Comments: This is the description of the check-in meeting in the invite.

columns.Name: CALENDAR_INVITE_LOCATION
columns.Comments: This is the location of the check-in meeting in the invite.

columns.Name: CLOSED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Identify if the check-in is closed or not.

columns.Name: ACTION_CODE
columns.Comments: Action Code for performing the action on the check-in meeting.

columns.Name: ACTION_REASON
columns.Comments: Reason for performing the action on the check-in meeting.

columns.Name: ACTION_PERFORMED_BY
columns.Comments: Stores the Person Id of the person performing the action.

columns.Name: ACTION_PERFORMED_DATE
columns.Comments: Timestamp when the action was performed.

columns.Name: TRANSCRIPT_SUMMARY
columns.Comments: Stores the summary of the transcript

columns.Name: TRANSCRIPT_FILE_NAME
columns.Comments: Stores the name of the transcript file.

columns.Name: TRANSCRIPT_FILE_UPLOADED_BY
columns.Comments: Stores the person id who uploaded the transcript file.

columns.Name: TRANSCRIPT_FILE_UPLOAD_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores the date on which transcript file got uploaded
